creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 185834
patch

Changes:
* Moved BROKEN_aarch64 according to portlint suggestion
* Added missing LIB_DEPENDS
* Added missing USE_QT5
* Added missing INSTALLS_ICONS=yes
* Switched to using system freefont
* Added the OCR port option to reflect the cmake option
* Removed redundant patches from files/, moved one to post-patch

QAs:
* poudriere 11.1 amd64 10.3 i386
* portlint
* runs fine
